course_descriptor: LazyEarn track, School of Hard Knocks interview series
dynamic_book_descriptor: Book 1 · A dynamic field book on wealth, business, and entrepreneurial method from the full Hard Knocks Interviews series
dynamic_book_target: build a real full-length book from the interview corpus rather than a lecture-by-lecture digest; each rewrite should synthesize the whole processed series and keep revising the same manuscript as new interviews arrive.
dynamic_book_style_target: make the book vivid, intriguing, and conceptually sharp, with a strong through-line that braids story, philosophy, commercial method, and wealth-building practice without turning into hype or motivational sludge.
dynamic_book_structure_target: maintain dynamic thematic chapters based on the evolving full-series understanding rather than one interview per chapter; allow earlier chapters to be revised, later chapters to be seeded in advance, and recurring ideas to move across the book when new interviews sharpen them.
deliverable_target: a faithful, source-conscious chapter for Hard Knocks Interviews, plus a per-course compiled PDF book.
visual_target: selected frames are supporting evidence for names, on-screen captions, charts, and interview context; do not let them override the spoken content.
mathematical_standard: preserve concrete claims, business details, and any quantitative or institutional statements, but avoid invented textbook exposition.
style_target: notes should read like a careful interview-derived companion text for wealth, entrepreneurship, and commercial reasoning, with explicit separation between anecdote, claim, and mechanism, and with enough narrative energy that the material can later feed a more nonlinear book.
credit_target: keep explicit credit to School of Hard Knocks and curation by LazyingArt LLC; reserve the website URL for front matter, not body prose.
front_matter_single: Original interview by School of Hard Knocks. Lecture notes organized by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.
front_matter_plural: Original interviews by School of Hard Knocks. Lecture notes organized by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.
reference_missing_text: No directly matching reference PDF is available for this course.
reference_no_match_text: Matching course reference PDFs were found, but no strong topical excerpt was automatically matched for this interview.
reference_budget_text: Matching course reference PDFs were found, but no excerpt fit within the current prompt budget.
